meta.title: For Small Businesses - CaltransBizConnect
meta.description: Small Businesses: Find contracting opportunities, upload your capability statement, and connect with Caltrans agencies.

fields.title: For Small Businesses
fields.subtitle: Connect with Caltrans contracting opportunities, showcase your capabilities, and grow your business through our streamlined platform.

cards.title: Find Opportunities
cards.body: Search and filter contracting opportunities across all Caltrans districts. Receive notifications for opportunities matching your expertise and service areas.

cards.title: Showcase Your Capabilities
cards.body: Upload your capability statement and profile to demonstrate your core competencies, past performance, and qualifications to prime contractors seeking partners.

cards.title: Streamlined Process
cards.body: Our platform guides you through every step, from account creation to opportunity application, eliminating confusion and decision fatigue.

steps.label: Create Your Account
steps.detail: Register as a Small Business with your business information and contact details.

steps.label: Complete Your Profile
steps.detail: Add your business details, certifications, and service areas to help prime contractors find you.

steps.label: Upload Capability Statement
steps.detail: Showcase your core competencies, past performance, key personnel, and qualifications.

steps.label: Select Districts and Categories
steps.detail: Choose the Caltrans districts and work categories that match your expertise.

steps.label: Search and Apply
steps.detail: Browse opportunities, filter by your preferences, and submit proposals directly through the platform.

fields.heading: What You Need to Get Started
Capability Statement Requirements
fields.intro: Your capability statement must include the following information to help prime contractors evaluate your qualifications:

cards.title: Core Competencies
cards.body: Detailed description of your primary services and areas of expertise

cards.title: Past Performance
cards.body: Examples of completed projects with scope, value, and outcomes

cards.title: Key Personnel
cards.body: Qualifications and experience of your leadership team

cards.title: Equipment & Facilities
cards.body: Resources available to complete contract work

cards.title: Financial Capacity
cards.body: Bonding capacity and financial stability indicators

cards.title: Certifications
cards.body: Current certifications, licenses, and insurance coverage

fields.heading: Ready to Get Started?
fields.text: Create your account today and start connecting with opportunities.
